title: 3-Ingredient Christmas Cake
excerpt: Fruit + Liquid + Self-raising flour = Fruit cake MOIST, EASY AND DELICIOUS! The easiest and most delicious fruit cake. Who says you have to wait for Christmas to eat it! Enjoy it now with tea, coffee or a lovely glass of wine. Ingredients: 1kg fruit mix + 1 box cherries (I buy Food …
html:
Fruit + Liquid + Self-raising flour = Fruit cake
MOIST, EASY AND DELICIOUS! The easiest and most delicious fruit cake. Who says you have to wait for Christmas to eat it! Enjoy it now with tea, coffee or a lovely glass of wine.

Ingredients:

  • 1kg fruit mix + 1 box cherries (I buy Food Lovers' bucket of fruit mix)
  • 575 ml rooibos tea + 125ml brandy optional (liquid must total 700ml)
  • 21/2 cups self-raising flour


Method:

Let the fruit soak overnight in the liquid.
Add the flour and a pinch of salt to the fruit
Stir everything through well.
Line your cake tin with baking paper and spray with Spray and Cook.
Pour the mixture into your tin.
Bake at 140 C for 2 hours. Test whether it's cooked through. Otherwise leave it a little longer in your oven.
If the cake starts getting too dark, put a piece of tinfoil on top.
Once it's done, take the cake out of your tin and sprinkle with brandy.
Cover with tinfoil and sprinkle regularly with brandy.
So, so easy and delicious!

For extra flavour:
– Cut green figs into your fruit mix.
– Add chopped nuts or sliced dates.
– Flavour with spices like cinnamon, ginger and nutmeg.
– Instead of tea you can use chocolate milk, coffee or fruit juice.

You'll never look back. This is the one!
